name: Courtney (Vore, Pred Pov)
description:
CW: Vore, Optional Cooking

Pred Pov

(Don't expect these to be regular)

During what was meant to be a short camping trip, you and Courtney get lost in a massive snowstorm sweeping the reigon. After a couple weeks of nonstop snow piling up, food and resources are getting dire...

Prey Pov of this scenario here. (The cooking is not optional.)

First pred pov bot, I just thought a pred pov would be fun to try for once, this scenario is a teensy bit more morbid than I thought it'd be, but just ignore it and think about eating the chubby pig girl.

The image generator couldn't give her actual pig ears, so she just has weird dog-bunny ears, and in the process of trying to reference what actual pig ears looked like, I learned that people also eat those. Pigs really are the meal animal, not a single piece goes uneaten.

Also a little test of a cooking vore thing, I know it's not everyone's cup of tea so it's optional here, she goes down raw just fine. Non-fatal cooking is personally one of my favorite vore types so if you also fall into the subset of freaks who really like the idea of being roasted/roasting someone like a holiday ham just lmk if you'd like more.
creator: SmutReader89
